name: kunalnagar/custom-404-pro
description: Override the default 404 page with any page or a custom URL from the Admin Panel.

scripts.makepot: npx wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/custom-404-pro /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/custom-404-pro/languages/custom-404-pro.pot --domain=custom-404-pro --exclude=vendor,tests,node_modules
